$comment: schema_version=1.0.0 | Added 2026-06-03 | Agent Runtime Layer. Breaking changes require engine_version bump + Architect RFC.
title: NOVA 2.5 Agent Registry
description: Schema for .task-locks/agents/registry.json. Rebuilt by agent-runtime.mjs from AGENT_REGISTERED events in TASK_EVENTS.jsonl. Never edited manually.

schema_version.description: Semver of this registry format. Bump on breaking schema changes.

generated_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of the last rebuild by agent-runtime.mjs.

event_count.description: Number of TASK_EVENTS.jsonl lines consumed to produce this registry.

agents.description: All agents that have ever issued an AGENT_REGISTERED event. Deregistered agents are retained with status=DEREGISTERED.

agent_id.description: Unique agent identifier. Sourced from the 'agent' field of AGENT_REGISTERED events.

capabilities.description: Roles this agent is permitted to hold. Parsed from the 'notes' field of AGENT_REGISTERED (e.g. 'capabilities=[IMPLEMENTATION,REFACTOR]').

model.description: LLM model name reported at registration time. May be null if the agent is not LLM-backed.

registered_at.description: UTC timestamp of the AGENT_REGISTERED event.

registered_at_event_index.description: event_index of the AGENT_REGISTERED event. Enables cross-referencing with the event log.

status.description: ACTIVE: agent is operational. SUSPENDED: temporarily disabled by Architect override. DEREGISTERED: no longer active.

notes.description: Raw notes string from the AGENT_REGISTERED event (e.g. 'capabilities=[IMPLEMENTATION,REVIEW] model=claude-opus-4-5').

last_seen_at.description: UTC timestamp of the most recent heartbeat or lease event from this agent. Updated by agent-runtime.mjs on each heartbeat scan.
